name: @algio85/tao
description: AI driven design system & workflow — OKLCH design tokens

scripts.sync-tokens: cp tokens/base/shades.json storybook/src/tokens/shades.json && cp tokens/semantic/*.json storybook/src/tokens/semantic/ && cp build/css/tokens.css storybook/src/tokens/tokens.css
scripts.build: npm run generate-shades && npm run build-tokens && npm run sync-tokens
